mapper.select: SELECT no,subject,name,TO_CHAR(regdate,'YYYY-MM-DD') as dbday, hit FROM jspboard ORDER BY no DESC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jspboard (name, subject, content, pwd, regdate, hit) VALUES( #{name}, #{subject}, #{content}, #{pwd}, SYSDATE, 0 )
